title: Regenerate bun.lock with Bun 1.3.14 to match CI/Docker

source.subject: fix: regenerate bun.lock with bun 1.3.14 to match CI/Docker

body:
Root lockfile aligned with CI/Docker Bun 1.3.14 after web_common and auth hub dependency churn.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`

- **Subject:** fix: regenerate bun.lock with bun 1.3.14 to match CI/Docker
- **Completed:** 2026-05-27

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `repo-cicd`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-cicd-realized`

## What shipped

Root lockfile aligned with CI/Docker Bun 1.3.14 after web_common and auth hub dependency churn.
